case_title: AMIN MERCHANT AND APEX TRADING HOUSE VS. CHARLES SCHWAB & CO, et al

docket_entries.description: EVIDENTIARY OBJECTIONS TO A MERCHANT'S DECLARATION FILED BY RESPONDENT CHARLES SCHWAB & CO PRUDENTIAL EQUITY GROUP SO, EDWARD

LAW AND MOTION 302, CROSS-COMPLAINANTS CHARLES SCHWAB & CO, PRUDENTIAL EQUITY GROUP AND EDWARD SO'S CROSS-PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD. COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING: GRANTED TO CONFIRM THE ARBITRATION AWARD. PETITIONER HAS FAILED TO PRESENT SUFFICIENT PROBATIVE EVIDENCE TO VACATE THE AWARD. THE RECORD REFLECTS THAT PETITIONER WAS GIVEN THE OPPORTUNITY TO CONTINUE THE HEARING AND DECLINED TO DO AND THE RECORD DOES NOT REFLECT AN AGREEMENT TO PRODUCE WITNESSES OR DOCUMENTS. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: PATRICK J. MAHONEY, REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO, CSR #8600
